description: This is a photograph depicting inland freshwater marshes at the Tablas de Daimiel Natura 2000 Site in Central Spain. The image shows a body of brownish-green water in the foreground, with a dense band of bright green emergent aquatic vegetation, likely reeds, growing from the water. In the mid-ground and background, a bank is covered with darker green, denser vegetation, appearing as woodland or shrub. The visible caption states: "Inland freshwater marshes in Tablas de Daimiel Natura 2000 Site (Central Spain). Credits: M. Palacios".
